Veil Regex Smoke Corpus

Use this fixture to manually verify default regex detectors and the custom sample patterns added for the `v1.2.4` follow-up.

Built-in Regex Hits

  • OpenAI key, AWS key, GitHub token, JWT
  • IPv4, IPv6, SSN, PAN, Aadhaar, Passport
  • IFSC, Driver License
  • Phone, address, credit card, DOB

Custom Regex Hits

  • Bank account
  • OAuth token
  • MAC address
  • Employee ID
  • Device ID
  • Session ID
